meaning: adj.(宇宙飞船、飞机或船的)航程中段的,中途的 n.航程中段,中途
examples: Couder says the rules of the game changed midcourse, and it's the workers who are paying the price.
The most exciting essays were written by the energetic, restless people, who took their lives off in new directions midcourse.
Once operational, the EKV will be a critical part of the Missile Defense Agency's Ground-based Midcourse Defense (GMD) system, scheduled for deployment in September 2004.
Provide support to Combatant Commanders to improve the ability to address midcourse countermeasures, operations support, and training.
But it also requires me to make some midcourse corrections and adjustments.
